title: hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. litigiosum
intro: Hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. litigiosum is a subspecies of the Hieracium cydoniifolium plant, a flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and its anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. litigiosum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to promote overall well-being.
